description: Multi-turn conversational memory tests for the text-to-SQL agent. Each conversation must be run in a single thread (same thread_id for every turn). Follow-up turns rely on prior context and should not be answerable without memory of earlier messages.

turns.message: How many films are in the database?
turns.memoryTest: Establishes baseline count query

turns.message: And how many customers are there?
turns.memoryTest: Should understand 'And' as a follow-up in the same analytical session without re-explaining the database

turns.message: What are the top 5 most-rented films by rental count?
turns.memoryTest: Returns ranked film list with rental counts

turns.message: Which actors appear in the first one?
turns.memoryTest: Must resolve 'the first one' to the top film from turn 1 without the user naming it again

turns.message: List the email addresses of customers who live in India.
turns.memoryTest: Returns Indian customer emails

turns.message: How many of those customers have made at least one payment?
turns.memoryTest: Must scope 'those customers' to the India cohort from turn 1

turns.message: What is the total revenue by store?
turns.memoryTest: Returns per-store revenue totals

turns.message: Which store earned more?
turns.memoryTest: Must compare the two stores from turn 1 results without re-asking for revenue

turns.message: Which films are rated PG-13?
turns.memoryTest: Returns PG-13 film set (potentially large)

turns.message: Show me just 3 titles from that list.
turns.memoryTest: Must limit to PG-13 films discussed in turn 1, not arbitrary films

turns.message: Which customers have never rented a film?
turns.memoryTest: Returns non-renting customers

turns.message: How many is that?
turns.memoryTest: Must count the same customer set from turn 1

turns.message: Which 5 actors have appeared in the most films?
turns.memoryTest: Returns top actors with film counts

turns.message: What is the film count for the top actor?
turns.memoryTest: Must reference the #1 actor from turn 1 and return their count

turns.message: List three films that actor starred in.
turns.memoryTest: Must resolve 'that actor' to the same person across turns 1–2

turns.message: Which films are in the Comedy category?
turns.memoryTest: Returns comedy films

turns.message: Among those, which ones have never been rented?
turns.memoryTest: Must intersect comedy films from turn 1 with zero rentals

turns.message: Which staff member processed the most rentals?
turns.memoryTest: Identifies top staff member by rental count

turns.message: Which store does that person work at?
turns.memoryTest: Must resolve 'that person' to the staff member from turn 1

turns.message: What are the 5 cities with the most customers?
turns.memoryTest: Returns city ranking by customer count

turns.message: What country is the top city in?
turns.memoryTest: Must resolve 'the top city' from turn 1

turns.message: How many other cities in that country appear in the list?
turns.memoryTest: Must use both the top city and the ranked list from prior turns
